Footer.description: Vietnam's leading online learning platform, connecting students with industry experts.

hero.subtitle: Learn from leading industry experts. Practical courses, constantly updated, learn anytime, anywhere.

categories.title: Explore by Category
categories.subtitle: Choose the field you want to develop in

features.title: Superior Learning Experience
features.subtitle: Built for modern learners
features.path_desc: AI analyzes and recommends a learning path that fits your goals and level.
features.cert_desc: Completion certificates recognized by over 200 companies in Vietnam and internationally.
features.mentor_desc: Schedule direct consultations with experienced instructors and mentors.
features.anywhere_desc: Smooth mobile app, supports offline lesson downloads to learn without internet.

testimonials.title: Thousands Have Transformed
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from the NexLearn community
testimonials.quote1: I found my first programming job after 3 months of studying on NexLearn. The teaching quality is truly impressive and close to business reality.
testimonials.quote2: The Data Science course helped me successfully switch from accounting to Data Analyst. Clear roadmap, rich practical exercises.
testimonials.quote3: Group learning and code review from mentors are big pluses. I learned a lot from the student community here.

cta.title: Start your learning journey today
cta.subtitle: Join for free, experience 7 days of Premium features. No credit card required.
